title: ambrosia humi
intro: Ambrosia humi, also known as the gumweed or gum plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ambrosia humi include relief from colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
